changelog: New: Routine download now bundles exercise images and videos into the .fitpulsroutine file on Android — uses CapacitorHttp to fetch media from apilyfta.com.
Fixed: Routine download now saves to app-internal storage (Directory.Data) for reliable write on all Android versions.
Fixed: Media bundling gracefully handles CORS-limited servers — media that can't be fetched is skipped, routine data is always saved.
Fixed: Unicode-safe btoa encoding for exercise names with special characters / emoji.
Fixed: Filename sanitized to alphanumeric-only to prevent Android path validation errors.
